mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_refreshtoken ( refresh_token_id, principal_type, principal_no, login_id, token_value, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_tbl_refreshtoken.nextval, #{principalType}, #{principalNo}, #{loginId}, #{tokenValue}, #{expiresAt}, NVL(#{revokedYn}, 'N'), SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT refresh_token_id AS refreshTokenId, principal_type AS principalType, principal_no AS principalNo, login_id AS loginId, token_value AS tokenValue, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_yn AS revokedYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tbl_refreshtoken WHERE principal_type = #{principalType} AND principal_no = #{principalNo}

SELECT refresh_token_id AS refreshTokenId, principal_type AS principalType, principal_no AS principalNo, login_id AS loginId, token_value AS tokenValue, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_yn AS revokedYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tbl_refreshtoken WHERE token_value = #{tokenValue}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_refreshtoken SET login_id = #{loginId}, token_value = #{tokenValue}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, revoked_yn = NVL(#{revokedYn}, 'N'), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE principal_type = #{principalType} AND principal_no = #{principalNo}
